meaning: vt.提及,说起n.提及,说起v.论及,提及
examples: He made no mention of her work.
Sorry, I won't mention it again.
I mention it only as an aside...
Not to mention the snow-capped peaks, bell-clad cows and open-air cable cars of Swiss fantasies.
There are going to be footprints all over my shoulders, not to mention yours.
